message:
test(flake-detector): add 23 unit tests for anytime-valid flake detector

Cover FlakeConfig defaults and clamping (alpha, lambda, sigma,
min_observations), threshold computation and override,
FlakeDecision::should_fail edge cases, EvidenceLog JSONL format,
detector initial state and accessors, warm-up tracking, fixed sigma
mode (variance_window=0), summary edge cases, determinism, batch
early stopping, e-value monotonicity, evidence log gating, and
reset behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
